ane_validation_note: Latency alone does not prove ANE execution. Run Instruments > Metal System Trace to confirm ANE routing.
ane_recommendation: validate ANE routing via Instruments before claiming ANE speedup
latency_recommendation: use --coreml for lower latency on this hardware
recommendation: CoreML hybrid is 2.90x faster than faster-whisper (56.8ms vs 164.5ms). Use --coreml if ANE utilization is confirmed via Instruments.
